nodes.label: Phase 5 design/plan (the depth-readout fix ladder)
nodes.rationale: Pre-run spec: the P4.3-decay diagnosis (trigger x multiplier, direction not capacity), the spine and envelope non-negotiables, the P5.0-P5.9 experiment ladder with two stopping marks, and the 4-Opus-agent review's KEEP/CHANGE/CUT decision ledger (meta-insight: preserve class DIRECTION not magnitude).

nodes.label: The Phase-5 problem: the depth decay is a direction failure, not capacity
nodes.rationale: Inherited from P4.3-decay: three controls (dead-unit, width, rank) refuted every capacity explanation; what remains is decay = trigger (task abstraction saturates at a task-dependent depth) x multiplier (no preservation term, so post-saturation layers overwrite) — the project's 4th appearance of density != class.

nodes.label: The spine: preserve/read the class DIRECTION, never a MAGNITUDE
nodes.rationale: Rank, variance, contrast-loudness, and goodness/energy are magnitudes, not the lever; the 4-Opus review's meta-insight: three sharpest findings (Tunnel-Effect rank reading, ReZero-alpha signal, whitening lever) all mistake a magnitude for the direction that carries class information — this bans reading goodness for placement, training a residual alpha from local contrast loss, and adding VICReg/Barlow to fix rank collapse.

nodes.label: The envelope: forward-first, bounded global on GD side only, never rewrite the SCFF stream
nodes.rationale: The P2.5 hard rule carried forward: read-only heads, detached top-down references, eligibility-trace x modulator updates are OK; anything that overwrites SCFF activations mid-stack is forbidden — this is why FTP and PEPITA are ruled out even though they work.

nodes.label: SCFFContrastOverlap — the cell under test (temperature + window as levers)
nodes.rationale: The Phase-3 adopted contrast (InfoNCE, two-mask) + coordination cell, promoted verbatim from the research-session seed code, exposing temperature and coordination window as the two Phase-5 levers; forward-only, per-sample, no batch statistics (continual-safety by construction).

nodes.label: The Phase renumber: Phase 5 = depth-readout fix; old 'Phase 5 = continual optimization' becomes Phase 6/Stage 2
nodes.rationale: The author's 2026-06-29 call: Phase 5 finishes the SCFF cheap-brain (this phase); the sleep-cadence/Ch7-gate continual-optimization work shifts to Phase 6 (later Stage 2, Phases 7-10); noise-hardening becomes its own Phase 6 (closing Stage 1) — orientation docs synced at close, not retro-edited mid-flight.
